owner_authorization: The owner accepted treating the published Webull Thailand API inventory as the available scope, using Webull only for documented capabilities, and designing a bounded UAT order-preview probe on 2026-07-20.

documented_roles: read-only account balance and positions under a separately locked probe
UAT order preview under a later separately authorized execution order
webull_role_boundary.forbidden_role: Webull Thailand OpenAPI may not be represented as an account-level corporate-action event, cash, unit, dividend, or split ledger while those endpoints are absent from the published Thailand inventory.
webull_role_boundary.paper_ledger_substitution_rule: Do not infer an auditable corporate-action ledger from balance or position deltas, a shared UAT account, global Webull endpoints, or undocumented SDK methods.
webull_role_boundary.future_broker_reconciliation: A later E0 paper-trade dry run may compare Lily accounting with a Webull app export or statement if one becomes available and is separately preregistered; it is not required or authorized by B4.9.

corporate_action_accounting_scope.alpha_vantage_limit: Current snapshot only; no point-in-time revision archive or ground-truth claim.
corporate_action_accounting_scope.yahoo_limit: Provider event stream only; adjusted close alone is forbidden and no ground-truth claim is allowed.
corporate_action_accounting_scope.comparison_limit: Agreement between the two sources cannot prove historical correctness, broker posting correctness, execution quality, strategy edge, E2, or deployment readiness.

fractional_preview_probe.purpose: Bound the fractional quantity accepted by the documented Webull Thailand UAT preview endpoint without placing, replacing, cancelling, or querying an order.
fractional_preview_probe.response_retention: Persist only quantity, HTTP class, normalized acceptance classification, documented error code when present, and a redacted canonical response hash; discard raw responses and messages.
fractional_preview_probe.classification_rule: Report the smallest accepted tested quantity and largest rejected tested quantity. Do not call either value the exact broker minimum unless a documented response field explicitly states the minimum.
fractional_preview_probe.amount_mode_rule: Do not test AMOUNT because the published preview schema lists AMOUNT as an entrust type but does not define a corresponding amount request field.
fractional_preview_probe.scope_rule: A VTI UAT preview result is representative capability evidence only and may not be generalized to all ten ETFs or production execution.

future_execution_requirements: Create a separate B4.10 runner, report schema, report validator, request guard, redaction checks, and hermetic fixtures.
Hash-lock the B4.10 execution gate and exact runner before the first UAT authentication or preview request.
Obtain explicit owner approval for B4.10 execution after the final request matrix and claim limits are reviewable.
Abort before network access if any UAT credential environment variable is missing.
Retain a machine-checkable zero-order attestation and validation-return seal.
hard_stops: Any Webull production host or account is selected.
Any endpoint other than the locked authentication paths or POST /openapi/trade/order/preview would be called.
Any place, replace, cancel, order-history, open-order, order-detail, balance, or position request would be called.
Any raw response, credential, token, account identifier, balance, position, or absolute local path would be persisted or logged.
Any automatic retry or request beyond the locked caps would occur.
Any validation price, return, signal, position, regime, benchmark, or PnL would be opened.
Any preview response would be described as a fill, execution guarantee, paper trade, exact all-symbol minimum, edge, E2, or deployment evidence.
Any paid action or real-money action would occur.
claim_limits: B4.9 is a scope decision and preregistration only; it produces no broker or provider evidence.
Closing the three-stream B4.7 path does not validate either remaining corporate-action source.

A future preview can establish only tested UAT request acceptance, not fills, production availability, all-symbol precision, execution quality, strategy edge, E2, deployment readiness, or real-money suitability.
L-1 remains scope-restricted E1 and validation returns remain sealed.
next_safe_action: Implement and lock B4.10 machinery for the exact UAT preview matrix, then obtain separate owner approval before any authentication or preview request.

source_lineage.use: Historical B4.7 three-stream design that is now closed without observation.
Published Thailand endpoint inventory and corporate-action ledger gap.
Production read-only capability and official preview-document snapshot.
Prior E0 evidence that all ten candidate instruments returned fractionable=true.
